message:
feat(server,cli): add mailbox activity lock for exclusive doctor operations

Introduce a file-based advisory lock (MailboxActivityLockGuard) that
prevents concurrent mutating doctor operations and server startups from
racing on the same SQLite mailbox:

Server (lib.rs):
- Add MailboxActivityLockMode (Shared/Exclusive) and MailboxActivityLockGuard
  with Drop-based unlock using fs2::FileExt
- acquire_mailbox_activity_lock_for_sqlite_path and
  acquire_mailbox_activity_lock_for_database_url provide path-normalized
  lock acquisition with clear contention error messages
- run_stdio now returns Result for proper error propagation

CLI (lib.rs):
- Add acquire_doctor_mailbox_activity_lock helpers that wrap the server
  lock API with CLI-appropriate error classification (resource-busy vs IO)
- Simplify handle_doctor_fix to use parameter-less doctor sub-commands
- Add test: doctor_mailbox_activity_lock_reports_resource_busy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
